articles.title_en: MONRE, ADB Fund Key HCMC Wastewater Plant Completion by 2026
articles.summary_en: MONRE, with ADB support, announces the final phase of a major Ho Chi Minh City wastewater treatment plant, targeting 2026 operational readiness.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Unveils 2026 National Water Quality Strategy for Mekong Delta
articles.summary_en: MONRE launches a strategic plan to boost national water quality, prioritizing Mekong Delta clean water and wastewater infrastructure throughout 2026.

articles.title_en: MONRE to Deploy Advanced Water Treatment Tech in Da Nang Projects 2026
articles.summary_en: MONRE announces the pilot of advanced, eco-friendly water treatment technologies for Da Nang projects, enhancing efficiency from 2026.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Intensifies Enforcement of Household Waste Classification in Major Cities
articles.summary_en: By 2026, Vietnam is rigorously enforcing the 2025 mandate for household waste classification, aiming to boost recycling. Fines and campaigns target Hanoi and HCMC.

articles.title_en: Industries Grapple with Evolving EPR Mandates Amidst Vietnam's Green Transition
articles.summary_en: Vietnamese industries face challenges adapting to 2024 EPR for packaging. Compliance grows but infrastructure gaps remain, spurring calls for clearer guidelines.

articles.title_en: Foreign Investment Surges in Vietnam's Waste-to-Energy Sector as Regulations Drive Demand
articles.summary_en: Stricter 2026 solid waste regulations and landfill reduction goals attract significant FDI to Vietnam's WtE and advanced recycling facilities.

articles.title_en: ADB Approves $550M for Ho Chi Minh City Green Transport & Resilience
articles.summary_en: HCMC secures major ADB funding for electrified public transport and flood mitigation, boosting urban sustainability.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Receives ADB Loan for Mekong Delta Logistics Hub Expansion
articles.summary_en: ADB provides $320M to develop a new logistics hub in the Mekong Delta, enhancing regional trade efficiency.

articles.title_en: ADB Funds $480M for Vietnam's Coastal Climate-Resilient Infrastructure
articles.summary_en: A new ADB loan supports Vietnam's coastal regions in building climate-resilient infrastructure against rising sea levels.

articles.title_en: ADB Approves US$250M for Central Vietnam Water & Sanitation Resilience
articles.summary_en: The ADB has approved a major loan for integrated water supply, sanitation, and wastewater treatment in Central Vietnam, aiming to bolster climate resilience for 500,000 residents.

articles.title_en: Mekong Delta Water Project Exceeds Targets, Boosts Public Health
articles.summary_en: An ADB-backed project in Vietnam's Mekong Delta for clean water and wastewater management is ahead of schedule, significantly improving public health and climate resilience for thousands.

articles.title_en: Smart Water Solutions Critical for Vietnam's Urban Growth, ADB Says
articles.summary_en: An ADB report for 2026 highlights smart water tech and digital solutions as essential for sustainable urban water, sanitation, and wastewater services in Vietnam, urging policy and investment.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's World Bank-Backed Water Project Nears 2026 Completion
articles.summary_en: Major WB-funded water project in Vietnam set for 2026 completion, improving access and climate resilience.

articles.title_en: World Bank Approves New Funding for Vietnam's Climate Water Initiatives
articles.summary_en: World Bank commits additional funds to expand Vietnam's climate-resilient water supply program by 2026.

articles.title_en: Environmental Gains Evident in Vietnam's WB Water Project by 2026
articles.summary_en: Reports highlight significant environmental improvements and sustainable practices in Vietnam's WB water project.

articles.title_en: JICA Commits JPY 60 Billion Loan for Ho Chi Minh City Metro Line 3 Extension
articles.summary_en: New loan from JICA will fund the critical next phase of HCMC's metro system, enhancing urban mobility and reducing carbon emissions.

articles.title_en: JICA Launches New Grant Project for Mekong Delta Climate Resilience 2026-2030
articles.summary_en: A new JICA grant aids Vietnam in developing sustainable agriculture and water management strategies for the Mekong Delta.
articles.source: Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment (MONRE)

articles.title_en: Da Nang Secures JICA ODA Loan for Smart Urban Environmental Infrastructure Upgrade
articles.summary_en: JICA's latest ODA loan will modernize Da Nang's wastewater treatment systems, boosting public health and environmental protection.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Industrial Parks Attract Record FDI in H1 2026 Amid Favorable Policies
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's industrial zones saw substantial FDI growth in H1 2026, driven by stable policies and strategic incentives for foreign investors.

articles.title_en: Nationwide Infrastructure Push Bolsters Vietnam's Industrial Park Competitiveness
articles.summary_en: Significant investments in transport, power grids, and digital infrastructure across Vietnam enhance industrial parks' appeal, boosting logistics efficiency.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Industrial Parks Pivot Towards High-Tech & Green FDI in 2026
articles.summary_en: Industrial parks in Vietnam prioritize sustainable, high-tech foreign investment, addressing labor and environmental concerns for long-term growth.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's PDP8 Drives Inaugural Offshore Wind Projects Towards 2030 Goals
articles.summary_en: 2026 marks construction start for key PDP8 offshore wind farms, a major step for Vietnam's renewable energy goals.

articles.title_en: Foreign Investment Pours into Vietnam's Renewables, But Grid & PPA Concerns Persist
articles.summary_en: Foreign investment boosts Vietnam's 2026 renewables. Grid and PPA issues remain key hurdles.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Boosts Solar with Advanced Storage Solutions to Stabilize National Grid
articles.summary_en: Vietnam in 2026 prioritizes solar projects with battery storage, enhancing national grid stability.

articles.title_en: Long Thanh International Airport Phase 1 Nears Completion, On Track for 2027 Operations
articles.summary_en: Long Thanh International Airport Phase 1 is on track for operational readiness by late 2026/early 2027, transforming regional air travel.

articles.title_en: Key Expressways Ben Luc-Long Thanh and Bien Hoa-Vung Tau Set for 2026 Connectivity
articles.summary_en: Ben Luc-Long Thanh & Bien Hoa-Vung Tau expressways near completion, crucial for seamless access to the new Long Thanh Airport.

articles.title_en: HCMC Progresses Feasibility Studies for Long Thanh Airport Metro Link
articles.summary_en: Feasibility studies advance for a metro link to Long Thanh Airport, enhancing future intermodal transport options.

articles.title_en: Ho Chi Minh City Unveils Advanced AI-Powered IOC Phase 2
articles.summary_en: HCMC launches its Phase 2 IOC, leveraging AI, 5G, and IoT for real-time traffic, disaster response, and public safety.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Smart City Program Accelerates with 2026 Digital Infrastructure Milestones
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's smart city program progresses, with multiple provinces launching IOCs. Focus on 5G, data infra, and integration.

articles.title_en: Global Tech Giants Boost Vietnam's Hyperscale Data Centers for Smart City IOCs
articles.summary_en: Global tech firms expand data centers in Vietnam, vital for smart city IOCs needing robust, low-latency infrastructure.
